management_filter.prompt: You are evaluating a short-term rental listing. Determine if this property appears to be managed by a professional property management company (e.g., Vacasa, Evolve, Sonder, Guesty-hosted portfolio, branded management site). If YES return: {"managed": true, "manager_name": "company name"}. If NO return: {"managed": false, "manager_name": "none"}. Only return valid JSON.

icp_classifier.prompt: Classify this operator into one category: 1 = Side-Hustle Host (1-2 units), 2 = Local Property Manager (3-20 units), 3 = Multi-Unit Pro (6-50+ units), 4 = Boutique Hotel (<100 rooms), 5 = Unknown. Return JSON: {"icp_type": number, "confidence": percentage}.

side_hustle_analysis.prompt: Analyze this 1-2 unit Airbnb host. Identify automation gaps, pricing gaps, exposure limitations. Return JSON: {"primary_pain": "", "exposure_gap": "", "automation_gap": "", "confidence": ""}

local_manager_analysis.prompt: Analyze this 3-20 unit independent operator. Identify operational bottlenecks, tech fragmentation, growth constraints. Return JSON: {"growth_constraint": "", "tech_gap": "", "automation_opportunity": "", "confidence": ""}

multi_unit_analysis.prompt: Analyze this 6-50+ unit operator. Identify performance gaps, RevPAR opportunity, exposure ceiling. Return JSON: {"performance_gap": "", "revpar_opportunity": "", "enterprise_gap": "", "confidence": ""}

boutique_hotel_analysis.prompt: Analyze this independent hotel under 100 rooms. Identify distribution gaps, pricing strategy limitations, OTA reliance. Return JSON: {"distribution_gap": "", "pricing_gap": "", "confidence": ""}

outbound_score.prompt: Score this lead 0-100 for outbound acquisition. Increase score if revenue > 40000, multiple listings, no manager detected, automation gaps visible. Decrease score if managed by large firm or outside North America. Return JSON: {"score": number, "reason": ""}
